'''Water cycs''' were large [[Jellyfish/Legends|jellyfish]]-like predators that floated in the rivers of [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]], though a similar creature was also found on [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]]. Never giving pursuit, they lay in wait for their prey, snatching it with their [[Limb/Legends|tentacles]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]''
